titleStmt.title: SII 41.53: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 53. (A.R. No. 52 of 1905.) Daḷavānūr, Gingee Taluk, South Arcot District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Īsvara temple in the same village.

summary.p: This is an order from Sāḷuva Maṅgudēva-mahārājaṉ sent to the ūravar of Talaivānallūr saying that made tax-free some tirunāmattukāṇi land of the temple as directed by (his superior) Aṇṇar Goppaṇar. Lines 5 to 7 give the names of some 12 hamlets which may be having the tax exempted land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Uṭaiyar kampaṇauṭaiyarkku śubhakriti varṣam paṅkuṉi mātam 10 2 cāḷuva maṅkutevamahārājaṉ Olaitalaivānallūr Ūravar kaṇṭu taṅkaḷūr Uṭai
yār taṉmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirunāmattukāṇi nañcey puñceyum Uṭaiyār jayaciṅkacōḷiśvaramuṭaiyanāyaṉār tevatānam vaṇṭāpeṟṟār
kāṇi kuṭinīṅkāt tevatānamum tirunāmattukāṇi tiruviḷakkuppuṟa Iṟaiyiliyum niṅkalāka pūrvvamāna tirunāmattukkāṇi mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyili nilam
patiṉāṟu māvum puṉceyum puṟavaṭaikaḷum sarvvamāniyamākavum pūrvvattil tirumaṭaiviḷākamum pūrvvamariyāti Aṇaittāyamum Aṇṇar
koppaṇar niruppaṭiye nāmum kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku cantirātittavarai cella kalveṭṭikoḷvatu § talavānallūr piṭākai kallālippaṭṭu
Uḷḷiyampākkam Aṇilāṭiyinampaṭṭum maruvūr nillālam nāvalental neṟkuppai marampaṭṭu tiruvaṉpaṭṭu
vaṭatāmamāppāṉpāṭi karukkampaṭṭu kalamaimā vaṭṭampāṭi .
Digital edition of SII 41.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
